name: koishi-plugin-get-image-local
description: 从本地精准调用图片，可指定群聊权限，协调指令管理

description.zh: 📸 从本地文件夹按编号精准调用图片，支持多指令、子文件夹递归查找、群聊私聊权限独立控制。适合表情包、题库图片等场景。
description.en: 📸 Precisely call local images by number, supports multiple commands, subfolder recursion, and independent permission control for groups and private chats. Ideal for memes, image databases, etc.
